subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of the mighty Throne! Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God and my Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل علیک بهاء الله رب العرش العظیم قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و سیدی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @prayer for nearness to God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
